creator: erdgeist@erdgeist.org
text:
Adam,

you're free to name your jails as you please. It's just that for
internal housekeeping the names are sanitized. So it is perfectly legal
to call your jails   www-2.local or hostname-j3, you just can not have
jails on the same host that do only differ in there non-alphanumerical
parts, i.e.  www-2.local and www_2.local

Regards,

  erdgeist
